evals.name: official-docs-web-search
evals.prompt: Search the web for rust async guidance, prefer the official async book, and return a compact JSON result list.
evals.expected_output: Compact Tavily-style JSON for official Rust async resources.
assertions: Returns compact Tavily-style JSON with query and results.

evals.name: latest-web-search
evals.prompt: Look up the latest OpenAI API model pricing updates and return a concise JSON result list.
evals.expected_output: Compact recent web-search results for a latest-information query.
assertions: Returns compact Tavily-style JSON with query and results.

evals.name: explicit-news-search
evals.prompt: Find today's AI news coverage and return a compact JSON list of articles.
assertions: Returns compact Tavily-style JSON with query and results.

evals.name: date-range-news-search
evals.prompt: Find climate summit news from April 1 through April 14, 2026 and return a concise JSON result list.
assertions: Returns compact Tavily-style JSON with query and results.

evals.name: domain-included-web-search
evals.prompt: Search for SEC filing coverage but keep results scoped to sec.gov and reuters.com, then return compact JSON.
assertions: Returns compact Tavily-style JSON with query and results.
Includes only the requested domains when possible.

evals.name: domain-excluded-web-search
evals.prompt: Search for Python dependency injection tutorials, exclude medium.com, and return a compact JSON result list.
assertions: Returns compact Tavily-style JSON with query and results.
Excludes the requested domain when possible.

evals.name: goggles-reranking-web-search
evals.prompt: Search for Python dependency injection with Brave Goggles that boost docs.python.org and downrank medium.com, then return compact JSON.
evals.expected_output: Compact web-search results using Brave-specific reranking.
assertions: Returns compact Tavily-style JSON with query and results.

evals.name: relevance-score
evals.prompt: Search for the best Python web framework and return results with relevance scores.
evals.expected_output: Compact web-search results with relevance scores.
assertions: Every result includes a numeric score in [0,1] and results are sorted by score descending.
